session.label: Your partner has been in there for

share.text: Right now {count} partners are on the throne. Mine is one of them. 🚽 notagain.one

wittySubtexts: That's {count} people scrolling this instead of knocking.
{count} people wondering if they fell in.
Solidarity. We're all in this together. Well, they're in there.
Someone in Auckland just tapped Mine too. The throne is universal.
The average visit is 8 minutes. Your partner disagrees.
{count} people waiting. And not one of them is knocking.
Fun fact: the bathroom lock was invented in 1852. Coincidence?
Somewhere right now, a phone charger is being taken hostage.
They said two minutes. That was twelve minutes ago.
This is fine. Everything is fine. 🙂

timeComments.text: 5 minutes. Still within normal range. Barely.
8 minutes. The national average. Your partner scoffs at averages.
10 minutes. They've found their phone. It's over.
15 min. That's longer than most TED talks.
20 min. They might be reading War and Peace in there.
25 min. At this point it's a lifestyle choice.
30 min. Longer than an episode of The Office.
40 min. This might be a new personal best.
45 min. Should we send a search party?
An hour. Legend has it they're still in there...

endMessages.text: That was quick! Speed run unlocked. 🏃
Under 5 minutes? A rare and beautiful thing.
Not bad! Under 10 minutes. There's hope.
A solid 20. The phone was definitely involved.
Classic. We're not judging. (We're judging a little.)
We were starting to worry. Welcome back to society.
We genuinely considered calling someone. Welcome back.
